headline: Dealing With a Denied Claim Due to an Old Injury
articleBody: Insurance adjusters often use 'pre-existing conditions' to dodge paying for new injuries. Even if you had an old back issue, if your job made it worse, you’re usually still covered. Don't let a "denied" letter be the final word on your health. We can help prove the workplace connection. Call 801-746-0290 to discuss how we can challenge their denial and get you paid.
